categories.title: Financial Health
categories.description: Current financial obligations and status of the association

items.title: Current & Delinquent Assessments
items.description: Amount of any assessment currently due, any delinquent assessments, and any special assessments levied but not yet paid

items.title: Past Due Assessments (45-day statement)
items.description: Any assessments against any unit past due over 30 days, current to within 45 days

items.title: Monetary Obligations Past Due
items.description: Any monetary obligation of the association past due over 30 days, current to within 45 days

items.title: Other Fees Payable
items.description: Any other fees payable to the association by unit owners

items.title: Anticipated Major Expenditures
items.description: Any expenditure or anticipated repair/replacement cost reasonably anticipated to exceed 5% of the board-approved annual budget

items.title: Annual Financial Statement
items.description: Annual financial statement including audit report (if prepared) for the prior year

items.title: Balance Sheet & Revenue/Expense Statement
items.description: Most recent balance sheet and revenue and expense statement of the association

items.title: Current Operating Budget
items.description: The current operating budget of the association

categories.title: Reserve Fund
categories.description: Reserve study status and funding adequacy

items.title: Reserve Study Existence
items.description: Statement whether the association does or does not have a reserve study prepared in accordance with RCW 64.90.545 and 64.90.550

items.title: Reserve Study Absence Disclosure
items.description: If the association does NOT have a current reserve study, the resale certificate must include the required statutory warning: 'This association does not have a current reserve study. The lack of a current reserve study poses certain risks to you, the purchaser. Insufficient reserves may, under some circumstances, require you to pay on demand as a special assessment your share of common expenses for the cost of major maintenance, repair, or replacement of a common element.' Mark as N/A if a reserve study exists.

items.title: Reserve Study Summary
items.description: Summary of the current reserve study must be included in documents provided

categories.title: Use & Occupancy Restrictions
categories.description: Rules governing how the unit can be used, rented, or occupied

items.title: Right of First Refusal / Transfer Restrictions
items.description: Any right of first refusal or other restraint on the free alienability of the unit in the declaration

items.title: Use & Rental Restrictions
items.description: Any restriction on the right to use or occupy the unit, including restrictions on leasing or rental

items.title: Age-Related Restrictions
items.description: Description of any age-related occupancy restrictions affecting the common interest community

items.title: Sale Proceeds Restrictions
items.description: Any restrictions in the declaration affecting the amount that may be received by a unit owner upon sale

items.title: Unit Violation Notice
items.description: Whether board has given or received notice that any existing uses, occupancies, alterations, or improvements violate governing documents

categories.title: Legal & Litigation
categories.description: Pending legal actions, judgments, and compliance issues

items.title: Unsatisfied Judgments & Legal Actions
items.description: Any unsatisfied judgments against the association and status of any legal actions in which the association is a party

items.title: Government Violation Notices
items.description: Whether board has received notice from a governmental agency of any violation of environmental, health, or building codes

items.title: Qualified Warranty Coverage
items.description: Whether units or common elements are covered by a qualified warranty under chapter 64.35 RCW and history of claims

items.title: Insurance Coverage
items.description: Description of any insurance coverage carried by the association and contact information for the association's insurance broker or agent

categories.title: Governance & Management
categories.description: Association governance structure, management, and documents

items.title: Declarant Control Status
items.description: Number of units still owned by the declarant, whether declarant has transferred control to unit owners, and date of transfer

items.title: Leasehold Estate Term
items.description: Remaining term of any leasehold estate affecting the common interest community and provisions governing extension or renewal

items.title: Common Element Sale or Encumbrance
items.description: Any pending sale or encumbrance of common elements

items.title: Governing Documents
items.description: Copy of declaration, organizational documents, rules/regulations, board and association meeting minutes for last 12 months

items.title: EV Charging Station Requirements
items.description: Any requirements related to electric vehicle charging stations in the unit or limited common elements, including application status, insurance, maintenance responsibilities, and costs

categories.title: Required Statutory Notice
categories.description: Mandatory disclosure notice that must appear in the resale certificate

items.title: Statutory Warning Notice
items.description: Resale certificate must include the required conspicuous notice about HOA membership obligations, assessment liens, and foreclosure risk
items.required_text: THIS UNIT IS LOCATED WITHIN A COMMON INTEREST COMMUNITY AND IS SUBJECT TO THE DECLARATION, BYLAWS, RULES, AND OTHER WRITTEN INSTRUMENTS...

delivery_requirements.seller_must_provide: Before execution of any contract for sale
delivery_requirements.buyer_review_period: 5 days to cancel after receiving certificate
delivery_requirements.statement_currency: Financial statements must be current to within 45 days
